title: Sextates Manager
description:
BUILD A CAREER. EARN THEIR TRUST. DISCOVER WHAT HAPPENS AFTER HOURS.

In Sextates Manager, you play as Tyler, a young man starting a new life in a new city. Your new job at a real estate office begins as an ordinary career opportunity, but the clients and colleagues you meet soon make your life far more personal.

Handle demanding clients, present luxury properties, manage unexpected situations, and build relationships with Emma, Chloe, Isabella, Maya, and Emily. Your dialogue choices affect their affection and allow you to discover new sides of their personalities.

FEATURES

14 story-driven chapters

Five adult female characters

Relationship and affection system

Meaningful dialogue choices

42 animated NSFW sequences presented in 2K resolution

14 unlockable Video Gallery collections

Slow and normal animation speed options

Cinematic mode for hiding scene controls

16 Steam achievements

Save, quick-save, history, auto-play, and skip features

VIDEO GALLERY

Adult scenes become available in the Video Gallery only after you reach them during the story. Once unlocked, each chapter’s animated sequences can be replayed directly from the main menu.

LANGUAGE SUPPORT

Interface and subtitle support: English, Italian, Spanish – Spain (Castilian), French, German, Portuguese – Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese, and Thai.

Interface-only support: Arabic, Danish, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese – Portugal, Turkish, Vietnamese, Czech, Finnish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Romanian, Greek, Swedish, and Hindi.

MATURE CONTENT NOTICE

This game is intended for adults only and contains explicit sexual content, nudity, mature dialogue, and animated NSFW scenes. All characters depicted in sexual situations are adults.
description_short: A story-rich adult visual novel where your choices shape everything. Start your new life as a real estate agent, prove yourself with clients, and build an intimate connection with your alluring boss, Emma. Every decision matters from the boardroom to the bedroom.
